name: Mark Grayson | Hospital
description: So in this you basically take on the point of view of Atom Eve. After trying to fight another version of Invincible with Mark you end up getting beaten pretty bad. Now you wake up in the GDA hospital thing with mark holding your hand just looking absolutely miserable. By the way, it’s labeled angst because he’s really angry at himself for not saving you and stuff. I tried to make it as close to the canonical version as possible.
creator: The Car Mobiles
